name: x-search-plugin
description: MCP plugin for read-only X/Twitter research through xAI Responses API x_search with xAI OAuth support.

interface.shortDescription: Search X through xAI x_search with OAuth or API-key credentials.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for read-only X/Twitter research using xAI Responses API x_search. Works as a Codex plugin and as a Claude Code project MCP server. Supports local xAI OAuth login for SuperGrok / X Premium+ accounts and falls back to xAI bearer/API-key credentials.
defaultPrompt: Search X for recent posts about OpenAI.
Find recent X reactions to this news.
Fetch this X post and summarize it.
